summary.original: Apply a teaching Caesar cipher (not for security).
summary.zhCN: 教学用凯撒密码（不用于安全场景）。

description.original: Apply a teaching Caesar cipher (not for security). Agent-OPT ships this as a first-party in-process Web plugin surface with capability-configured Web controls, deterministic validation, and no external network or credentials. It is not counted as an upstream MCP server.
description.zhCN: 教学用凯撒密码（不用于安全场景）。 Agent-OPT 将其作为一等公民的进程内 MCP 兼容工具面：专属 Web 控件、确定性校验，且不访问外网、不需要凭证。 ?????? MCP Server ???

evidence.note: First-party in-process plugin implementation for slug local-caesar with tools: shift_text
Adapter registration wires the local MCP catalog into the shared invoke path used by Web and tests.

license.evidence: First-party Agent-OPT code under the repository MIT license; no third-party package redistribution required.

description.original: Local plugin tool shift_text executed in-process.
description.zhCN: 进程内执行本地 MCP 工具 shift_text。

notes: In-process first-party plugin surface; no child process, host FS, or network access.
Inputs are schema-validated and size-bounded before execution.
First-party local plugin with a capability-configured Web form and bounded in-process adapter.
It is intentionally classified as plugin, not mcp-server, because it does not expose an MCP protocol transport.
Verification remains not-run until the current Vitest matrix and a real per-slug Chromium workflow pass.
Chinese name/summary reviewed for the local MCP catalog entry.

tests.evidence: local-caesar: all exposed tools ran through invokePluginTool with valid fixtures and returned non-error content plus structuredContent; the matrix covered 42 plugins and 51 tools.
local-caesar: every exposed tool completed through the real Next POST /api/plugins/[slug]/invoke handler with HTTP 200 and the expected plugin identity.
local-caesar: every tool rejected a non-object payload, unknown tools were rejected, representative semantic failures were controlled, and the HTTP route returned 400 for invalid input.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=local-plugins.spec.ts › first-party local MCP browser coverage › @web-e2e [local-caesar] runs every UI tool and renders a controlled failure; route=/plugins/local-caesar; result=passed
local-caesar: registration asserted in-process mode; manifest permissions remain filesystem/network/commands none with no secrets or external accounts.
